name: Arm Holdings
analysis: ARM's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $359.0800, stop $295.3962, target $427.9900 (1.08:1) — then trail it.
